title: M07 Mastery Check — The Editor Layer

tasks.title: Find the Lexical State Bug
tasks.prompt:
This code attempts to read the editor's text content. Find the bug:

```typescript
const text = editor.getEditorState().root.children[0].text
```
success_criteria: Identifies direct property access on EditorState is wrong
Correct pattern: editor.getEditorState().read(() => { const root = $getRoot(); const text = root.getTextContent(); return text })
Explains that EditorState is opaque — content must be accessed inside a read() callback

tasks.title: Describe the Two-Representation Model
tasks.prompt: Explain Meridian's two-representation model for page content: what each representation is, when each is the source of truth, and how they are kept in sync. No code required — written explanation only.
success_criteria: Identifies Yjs Y.Doc as live collaborative state (source of truth while editing)
Identifies blocks table as durable persistent record (source of truth at rest)
Describes syncPageBlocks() or equivalent sync mechanism
Notes that Lexical is connected to Yjs via a binding
